title: NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Project Nurse Posts
description: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences, Bangalore (NIMHANS) has issued the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for Project Nurse Positions. Candidates who have qualified for M.Sc Nursing or M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk...
